title: callicarpa rubella var. subglabra
intro: Callicarpa rubella var. subglabra is a plant species known for its vibrant purple flowers and edible berries, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Callicarpa rubella var. subglabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. Callicarpa rubella var. subglabra can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural food coloring.
